2001_facup_arsenal_liverpool: Liverpool and Arsenal drew 0-0 in their Premier League clash on Saturday. Arsenal take the lead through a Pires free kick after 13 minutes. Liverpool equalise through a Heskey goal in the second half. The match will be shown live on BT Sport on Sunday, May 19. Click here to read Sportsmail's match report.
2021_euro_england_ukraine: England face Ukraine in the last eight of the World Cup in Italy. It is England's first visit to the last four of a major competition since the 2006 World Cup. If England beat Ukraine, only Denmark will stand between them in the first major final in 55 years. Click here to follow the England vs Ukraine match LIVE.

2022_wc_poland_argentina: Argentina take on Poland in World Cup Group D clash. Winner of this group will go through to a last 16 game against Australia. The runners-up will have to take on world champions France. Saudi Arabia take on Mexico in the other game this evening. The game will be shown on 5-LIVE, on BBC Sounds over the next couple of days.
1983_facup_final_brighton_manchesterunit: Brighton and Hove Albion beat Manchester United 1-0 in the FA Cup final. Michael Robinson scored both goals for the Seagulls. Frank Mosley scored the only goal of the game for Manchester United. Manchester United defender David Morris was sent off for a second bookable offence. Chris Ramsey makes his debut for Brighton after joining on a free transfer.
2024_euro_england_slovakia: England and Slovakia meet in the round of 16 of the European Championships. The winner will play Switzerland in the quarterfinals on Saturday. England's Jordan Pickford scored the opening goal of the game. Slovakia's Davide Strelitz has been chosen up front rather than Boschiennik.
2026_ucl_athleticclub_arsenal: Arsenal take on Athletic Bilbao in their Champions League opener. The Gunners are bidding to win the competition for the first time in their history. Eliaquim Mangala scored the only goal of the game in the first half. Arsenal beat Athletic Bill Bow 1-0 in their Premier League clash.
2022_wc_england_senegal: England beat Senegal 1-0 in their World Cup last 16 clash. Jordan Henderson scored the only goal of the game in the 26th minute. It was England's first win over an African team in a World Cup knockout match since the famous 3-2 win against Cameroon at Italia 90.
2021_euro_czechrepublic_england: England take on the Czech Republic in Euro 2020 Group D clash. Three Lions have already qualified for the last 16 of the tournament. Czechs have won all three of their games against the Three Lions. Raheem Sterling scored the only goal of the game in the first half. England will go through if they finish third in the group.
